overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a video game depicting an ancient library or temple. The player character in hooded robes walks through grand halls with stone columns and mosaic floors, circles a large armillary sphere, briefly exits to a sunlit courtyard, then re-enters through a corridor lined with bookshelves and classical statues.

scene_state.functional_zone: grand library hall with central astronomical instrument

events.description: character enters the library hall through a large stone doorway

agents.ego_description: walking steadily into the grand hall toward the central armillary sphere

notable_agents.action: scholar in green toga examining scrolls on a wooden table
robed figure standing near the back wall observing the sphere

entered.detail: large bronze astronomical instrument with rotating metal rings
tall stone column with decorative capital and vertical grooves
intricate geometric tile pattern in beige and dark brown
wooden table covered with papyrus scrolls and writing materials

segments.scene_description: The character enters a grand library hall through a stone doorway, walking toward a massive armillary sphere at the center. The space features tall fluted columns, intricate mosaic floors, and scholars examining scrolls at wooden tables. Natural light filters down from an opening in the roof above.

scene_state.functional_zone: central area around the astronomical sphere

events.description: character looks upward at the upper balcony and ceiling architecture
character approaches the far exit leading to the outdoor courtyard

agents.ego_description: circling the armillary sphere and examining the architecture before heading toward the exit

notable_agents.action: scholar walking past carrying a scroll

entered.detail: second-floor walkway with stone balustrade visible above the main hall
large stone doorway leading to the exterior courtyard

segments.scene_description: The character moves deeper into the hall, circling the armillary sphere which dominates the central space. The camera tilts upward to reveal an upper balcony level. The character then turns toward a large exit doorway at the far end of the hall, passing a scholar walking in the opposite direction.

events.description: exiting the building into bright sunlight
crossing the courtyard toward the opposite entrance

agents.ego_description: walking across the sunlit stone courtyard toward the far doorway

notable_agents.action: man in white tunic walking toward the entrance

entered.detail: open stone-paved area with benches and bright sunlight
simple stone seating along the courtyard walls

segments.scene_description: The character exits the library into a bright sunlit courtyard, transitioning from diffused interior light to harsh natural sunlight. The space is an open-air stone plaza between building wings. The character crosses toward a doorway on the opposite side where another figure is entering.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered walkway with bookshelves and statues

events.description: re-entering the library through a side corridor
moving deeper into the dimly lit corridor away from the entrance light

agents.ego_description: walking through the long corridor lined with bookshelves and classical statues

notable_agents.action: woman in green dress walking ahead in the same direction

entered.detail: tall wooden shelves filled with rolled papyrus scrolls
ornate red and gold patterned carpet runner along the walkway
classical marble human figure on pedestal between columns

segments.scene_description: The character re-enters the building into a long enclosed corridor lined with bookshelves packed with scrolls. A red carpet runs down the center of the mosaic floor, and white marble statues stand between the columns. The character follows a woman in a green dress deeper into the dimly lit passageway.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the interior of a grand, scholarly hall through a bright outdoor plaza and back into a secluded library corridor. It begins as the character enters a vast hall of fluted columns and mosaic floors, moving toward a massive central armillary sphere while natural light filters down from the roof. As the camera circles the sphere and tilts upward toward an upper balcony, the path leads toward a distant exit, passing a scholar along the way. The scene then shifts abruptly from diffused interior light to harsh natural sunlight as the character crosses an open-air stone courtyard toward an opposite doorway. Finally, the environment transitions back into a dimly lit enclosed passageway lined with bookshelves and marble statues, following a woman in a green dress down a red-carpeted hall.
